protein_name: May serve as a molecular marker for or play a role in the malignant progression of glioblastomas. Expressed predominantly in brain and weakly in heart and lung. Expression is reduced or undetectable in cultured glioma cells, primary glioblastoma cells and malignant glioblastoma tumors. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Protein regulated in glioma; Putative protein RIG; RIG
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 8.36 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
